message:
feat(scheduler): add ScopedLocalScheduler for thread-local spawn routing

Add a scoped RAII guard (ScopedLocalScheduler) that temporarily installs
a local PriorityScheduler into the CURRENT_LOCAL thread-local. While
active, ThreeLaneScheduler::spawn routes tasks to this local scheduler
instead of injecting into the global ready queue. When the guard is
dropped, the previous thread-local value is restored.

This enables worker threads to capture spawned tasks locally during
structured concurrency scopes, avoiding global queue contention and
preserving task locality for cache-friendly scheduling.

Also resolves stash-pop merge conflicts in mutation.rs and Cargo.toml
files by keeping the canonical upstream versions (0.2.6 dependency
versions, upstream test implementations with full invariant coverage).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
